questions.prompt: Write an essay of about 250 words on the following topic: Many universities now offer both online and face-to-face classes. Which form of learning do you think is more effective for university students? Give reasons and examples to support your opinion.

Write an essay of about 250 words on the following topic: Some people believe that cities should invest more in public transport, while others think improving roads for private vehicles is more important. Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write an essay of about 250 words on the following topic: Many university students take part-time jobs while studying. Do the advantages of having a part-time job outweigh the disadvantages? Support your answer with relevant reasons and examples.
